# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/python-poetry/poetry/issues/2681
# repo: python-poetry/poetry
# title: `poetry self update --preview` leads to `[WinError 5] Access is denied: 'py3.7\\msgpack\\_cmsgpack.cp37-win_amd64.pyd'`
